metadata.title: WXCode Design Plugins
metadata.description: First-party admin / dashboard / cockpit plugins curated by WXCode for Open Design daemons. Tenant VMs register this catalog as a marketplace source to consume plugins without rebuild.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-aegis-insurance
plugins.title: Aegis Admin
plugins.description: Institutional light-mode admin aesthetic: white cards on a cool #f6f8fb page, deep-navy sidebar (#0f2057) with teal accent (#14b8a6), navy-600 (#2563eb) as the primary interactive color, Inter type, and inline sparklines. Archetype = 240px grouped sidebar (entity switcher + labeled nav groups) + sticky topbar + 4 KPI cards + horizontal pipeline board (4 stages) + 2-column lower grid (records table + side panel) + full-width inline SVG trend chart, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-ai-copilot
plugins.title: AI Copilot Admin
plugins.description: Split-pane admin aesthetic: deep-navy canvas (#0f1419), indigo accent (#6366f1), pink secondary (#ec4899), compact system-ui type, and hairline-bordered cards. Archetype = top bar with centered Cmd+K pill + 64px icon-only nav rail + scrollable widget canvas (KPI tiles × 4 + area-chart card + records table) + 380px right copilot rail (header · thread with tool-call cards + inline artifacts + suggestion chips · sticky composer) + 32px bottom status bar. Built for agentic admin UIs where the agent is a first-class layout region.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-aurora-analytics
plugins.title: Aurora Admin
plugins.description: Light-mode admin aesthetic: crisp white-and-slate canvas, indigo-violet accent ramp, clean Inter type, subtle card shadows, and soft 12px radius panels. Archetype = fixed 240px sidebar with grouped nav + sticky topbar (search + actions + avatar) + 4 KPI cards with inline sparklines + primary area chart + records table + right-rail side panel (donut + insight bullets + activity feed), plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-bento-overview
plugins.title: Bento Overview
plugins.description: Light-mode bento-grid admin aesthetic: neutral canvas (#f6f7f9), white tiles, hairline borders, and a multi-accent palette of indigo, teal, amber, and rose. Archetype = sticky header with period chips + full-width asymmetric CSS grid of hero, chart, KPI, activity feed, donut, mini-table, and status tiles — no sidebar. Matching list, form, and detail screens complete the set.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-bloom-nonprofit
plugins.title: Bloom Admin
plugins.description: Warm optimistic light-mode admin aesthetic: page canvas #f7fbf9, white cards, emerald accent (#10b981) with coral counter-accent (#fb7185), soft dividers, sidebar-nav layout with entity/scope switcher and program chips, topbar with search and period tabs, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, 2-column mid-row (progress list + segment donut), full-width dual-area trend chart, and dense records table with type pills.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-carbon-devops
plugins.title: Carbon Admin
plugins.description: Near-black terminal admin aesthetic: carbon canvas (#0b0d10), raised panels (#14171c), green accent (#22c55e), blue secondary (#3b82f6), monospace IDs and codes on every key cell, amber/red state pills. Archetype = entity-switcher navbar with env pill switcher + icon rail + 4 KPI tiles with sparklines + pipeline board with stage chips + inline SVG bar chart + severity feed side panel + dense records table, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-cargo-fleet
plugins.title: Cargo Fleet Admin
plugins.description: Industrial-clean light-mode admin aesthetic: white/slate canvas, dark-navy sidebar, orange-amber accent family, crisp status pills, and compact bordered cards. Archetype = branded sidebar with entity switcher and grouped nav + topbar with search and context filter + 4 KPI cards + 2-column middle (Kanban status board + abstract network visualization) + full-width records table with status pills, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-circle-social
plugins.title: Circle Admin
plugins.description: Friendly light-mode admin aesthetic: white card surfaces on a soft grey canvas (#f8f9fc), blue (#3b82f6) and violet (#8b5cf6) dual-accent, system font, 12px rounded cards, hairline borders, subtle shadows, and crisp role/status pills. Archetype = left sidebar (brand mark + context switcher + grouped nav) + sticky topbar + 4 KPI cards + action-queue panel + side panel + area chart + records table, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-cobalt-projects
plugins.title: Cobalt Admin
plugins.description: Light-mode admin aesthetic: near-white canvas, cobalt-blue accent (#2563eb), white card surfaces with soft borders and subtle shadow, chromatic category chips, compact priority and status pills, sparkline KPI cards, Gantt strip, and sidebar entity list. Card-forward, clarity-first operational console skin.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-coral-billing
plugins.title: Coral Admin
plugins.description: Clean light-mode SaaS admin aesthetic: white/near-white canvas (#f8f9fb), coral accent (#f43f5e / #fb7185), slate-blue navigation (#475569), soft-shadow cards with 1px borders, and tabular-nums on every figure. Archetype = fixed sidebar (logo + workspace switcher + grouped nav) + sticky topbar (search + period tabs + avatar) + 4 KPI cards + trend-chart card + breakdown bar card + records table + items-at-risk side panel, plus list / form / detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-corona
plugins.title: Violet Night Admin
plugins.description: Dark admin aesthetic: deep-charcoal canvas (#191c24), violet accent (#8862e0) on a violet-to-blue gradient for primary actions, Rubik type at weight 500 headings, 4px card radius, subdued #6c7293 body text, and #2c2e33 hairline borders. Archetype = top navbar with search + user controls, left icon sidebar, KPI card row (4 tiles), 2-column grid with a chart panel and a status list, plus a full-width data table — all balanced between density and breathing room.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-darkpan
plugins.title: Onyx Sharp Admin
plugins.description: Midnight-black admin aesthetic: pure-black canvas (#000000), deep charcoal panels (#191c24), teal accent (#009688), muted slate body text (#6c7293), hairline borders (#2a2e38), Open Sans type, and zero-radius sharp corners throughout. Archetype = collapsible icon sidebar + top header bar + KPI metric tiles + data tables with teal status pills + form screens with inline validation. A crisp, zero-radius dark panel system suited for high-information operational dashboards.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-dense-grid
plugins.title: Dense Grid Admin
plugins.description: Maximum-information-density dark-mode admin aesthetic: near-black canvas (#0c0f12), blue accent (#3b82f6), green/red directional signals, all-monospace tabular figures on a 4-px grid. Archetype = slim toolbar + 2-column main grid: primary data table + secondary mini-table (left), sparkline strip + depth panel + stats strip (right). Every pixel earns its place.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-ember-campaigns
plugins.title: Ember Admin
plugins.description: Vibrant-but-clean light-mode admin aesthetic: white/#fafafa canvas, rose-pink accent (#e11d48) on a slate neutral ramp, secondary indigo for chart contrast, #ececf0 borders. Left sidebar with brand icon + nav sections + footer cluster, sticky topbar with search + date-range + bell + avatar, 4 KPI cards with inline SVG sparklines and delta chips, a 7/5 split middle row (multi-series SVG line chart + conversion funnel bars), and a full-width records table with typed channel chips and status pills.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-estate-realty
plugins.title: Estate Realty Admin
plugins.description: Refined light-mode admin aesthetic: near-white canvas (#f7f9f9), deep teal sidebar (#0f2623), teal accent (#0d9488 / #14b8a6), 12px-radius white cards with teal shadow, and tabular Inter type. Archetype = 240px teal sidebar (entity switcher + grouped nav) + sticky 60px topbar (search + filter + avatar) + 4 KPI cards with sparklines + 60/40 grid (records table + ranked leaderboard) + full-width 5-stage horizontal pipeline, plus list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-finance-terminal
plugins.title: Terminal Admin
plugins.description: Pure-black monospace terminal aesthetic: page canvas #0E0E0E, raised panels #1A1A1A, amber accent (#FFB800), monospace type throughout, zero-radius sharp edges, and 1px grid-line borders. Archetype = 32px status bar + 24px ticker strip + 200px F-key module rail + 3-column body (rail | center 2-row | right 2-row) + 36px command-line footer. Built for high-density real-time consoles that must scan 50+ data points without scrolling.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-forge-mes
plugins.title: Forge Admin
plugins.description: Dark industrial-grade admin aesthetic: near-black canvas (#0c0f14), raised steel panels, molten-orange accent (#f97316), Inter type with tabular figures, and dense hairline-bordered tables. Archetype = entity-switcher navbar + icon rail + 4 KPI tiles + 2-column status board with an alerts side panel + full-width records table with status pills, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for high-density operational consoles that read at a glance.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-frost-glass
plugins.title: Frost Glass Admin
plugins.description: Glassmorphism admin aesthetic: deep indigo-violet-teal radial gradient canvas, frosted translucent panels (backdrop-filter blur, 1px rgba-white borders, soft ambient shadow), cyan (#22d3ee) and violet (#a78bfa) dual-accent system, near-white text on dark surfaces. Archetype = glass sidebar + topbar + 4 KPI tiles with sparklines + area chart with period tabs + alerts side panel + full-width records table with status pills, plus list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-glassmorphism
plugins.title: Glassmorphism Admin
plugins.description: Dark-mode admin built on frosted glass panels — translucent surfaces (rgba white 4%) with backdrop-filter blur over a soft aurora gradient background, cyan accent (#4dd0e1), hairline white-alpha borders, soft inner glow on actives. Archetype = glass sidebar + glass topbar + 4 KPI tiles with sparklines + 2-column main grid (area chart / top-N list) + full-width glass records table with tinted status capsules, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-harbor-banking
plugins.title: Harbor Admin
plugins.description: Light-mode card admin aesthetic: white surfaces on a slate-tinted canvas (#f6f8fb), navy-to-blue primary gradient (#1e3a8a → #2563eb), teal secondary (#0d9488), 10px card radius, hairline borders, and subtle shadows. Archetype = narrow dark-navy entity-list sidebar + sticky topbar with search pill + hero row (stylized card SVG + 3 KPI tiles) + 2-column content area (donut chart + dense records table left; quick-action panel + scheduled items right). Optimised for high-trust, card-centric operations consoles.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-jetstream-airline
plugins.title: Jetstream Admin
plugins.description: Dark navy precision-control admin aesthetic: near-black canvas (#0a0f1a), indigo + sky-blue dual-accent on a cool-blue neutral ramp, slim 48px navbar with entity-switcher pill, icon-only rail, 4 KPI tiles, live-status board with state pills, inline SVG bar chart, full-width records table with filter chips, and a resource side panel. Built for high-density operational consoles with a cool, precision-control feel.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-kaiadmin
plugins.title: Azure Rail Admin
plugins.description: Light content-area + dark sidebar admin aesthetic: page canvas #f5f7fd, crisp white cards with 10px radius, deep navy sidebar (#1a2035), blue primary accent (#1572e8), body text #5a5a5a, Public Sans typography, bold 700 headings. Archetype = fixed dark vertical sidebar (icon + label nav) + sticky top header bar (page title + search + action icons + avatar) + 4-tile KPI row + 2-column dashboard grid (status overview panel + chart panel) + full-width records table with status pills. Complementary screens: list, form, charts, profile/settings, login.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-kinetic-fitness
plugins.title: Kinetic Admin
plugins.description: Energetic dark-green admin aesthetic: deep forest-green canvas (#0f1410), lime accent (#84cc16), Inter type with tabular figures, and dense hairline-bordered panels. Archetype = slim topbar (brand + search + entity-switcher + avatar) + icon rail + 4 KPI tiles + 2-column row (slot/schedule list with capacity bars + area-chart card) + full-width records table with status pills + 3-card personnel panel, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for high-density operational consoles with an energetic, athletic character.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-mazer
plugins.title: Soft Blue Admin
plugins.description: Light friendly admin aesthetic: soft cloud-blue page background (#f2f7ff), white card surfaces with 11px radius, deep navy body text (#25396f), indigo-blue primary accent (#435ebe), and Nunito type at 700 weight headings. Archetype = fixed sidebar with collapsible nav groups + top header bar + 4-tile KPI row + mixed content grid (charts panel + recent-activity list + status table) + full-width data table with badge-status pills, plus list, form, settings, auth, and error screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-meadow-agri
plugins.title: Meadow Admin
plugins.description: Light-mode natural admin aesthetic: white and #f7faf5 surfaces, #e6ece1 borders, accent green (#16a34a) and earth-amber (#a16207) on a slate neutral ramp, Inter type with tabular figures, 12px soft card radii, and generous whitespace. Archetype = 240px left sidebar (entity switcher + grouped nav sections) + full-width topbar with search + context badge + avatar + 4 KPI cards + status board with inline SVG trend chart + telemetry readings table + right context panel + task side card. Built for calm operational oversight interfaces.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-meridian-people
plugins.title: Meridian Admin
plugins.description: Warm-professional light-mode admin aesthetic: off-white canvas (#f8f8fb), indigo accent (#4f46e5), white sidebar and cards with hairline borders and soft shadows, Inter type, 12px card radii, 11px uppercase micro-labels, and multi-tone status pills. Archetype = 240px fixed sidebar (entity-switcher card + grouped nav sections + footer user row) + 60px topbar (title/breadcrumb + search + period tabs + bell + avatar) + 4 KPI tiles (figure + delta chip + sparkline) + 2-column grid (area-chart card + horizontal-bar breakdown card) + full-width avatar-records table + 320px side-panel (queued-approvals list), plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-midnight-ops
plugins.title: Midnight Ops
plugins.description: Dark navy teal-accent admin aesthetic: midnight-navy canvas (#0b1120), raised cool-grey panels, teal-to-cyan accent gradient (#14b8a6 / #22d3ee), glowing status dots, Inter type with tabular figures, and compact hairline-bordered tables. Archetype = slim navbar (logo + search + context switcher + icon actions + avatar) + compact left icon rail + 4 metric tiles with inline sparklines + full-width time-series area chart + status-list side panel + full-width records table with severity and state pills, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for high-density real-time consoles.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-neobrutal
plugins.title: Neobrutalist Admin
plugins.description: Neo-brutalist admin aesthetic: white canvas with thick black borders (2–3px), hard 4px offset shadows (no blur), vibrant pastel accent blocks (coral #F5A86E, lime #8FD14F, cream #FFF5E6), monospace numerics and uppercase micro-labels, zero border-radius everywhere. Archetype = left sidebar (brand block + monospace nav glyphs + user footer) + top bar (cream search slab + lime CTA) + 4 stat tiles with coloured top-border accents + 2-column content grid (records table + activity feed) + footer meta strip, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-onyx-crypto
plugins.title: Onyx Admin
plugins.description: Deep-obsidian admin aesthetic: near-black canvas (#0a0a0f), elevated dark panels (#14141c / #1c1c28), emerald primary accent (#10b981) with neon glow hover, violet secondary accent (#8b5cf6), Inter type with tabular-nums, neon-tinted delta chips, 10px radii, hairline borders. Archetype = wide labeled left rail (220px) + sticky topbar (context-switcher pill + entity address pill + search + icon actions) + 4 KPI sparkline cards + main grid (area chart with timeframe tabs / ranked-rows side panel) + full-width records table with delta-colored column. Matching list, form, and detail screens included.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-pixel-liveops
plugins.title: Pixel LiveOps Admin
plugins.description: Deep-space dark admin aesthetic: near-black canvas (#0c0a14), neon purple (#a855f7) and cyan (#22d3ee) dual-accent on a violet-tinted dark neutral ramp, compact tabular typography, glowing pill hover states. Archetype = full-height sidebar (entity switcher + grouped nav sections + footer user chip) + topbar (title · search · period-selector pills) + 4 KPI tiles with sparklines + 2-column grid (area-chart card + segments side panel) + full-width status-event table + full-width ranked items list, plus list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-pulse-crm
plugins.title: Pulse Admin
plugins.description: Airy light-mode admin aesthetic: white/slate canvas (#f8fafc), sky-blue accent (#0ea5e9 / #2563eb), subtle 1px borders, 10px-radius white cards with a faint drop shadow, Inter type with tabular figures. Archetype = workspace-switcher sidebar (240px) + topbar with search and filter chips + 4 KPI tiles with inline SVG sparklines and delta chips + a stage-progress strip (N columns, proportional fill bars) + a 2-column split (records table + activity/tasks side panel), plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-quartz-lms
plugins.title: Quartz Admin
plugins.description: Friendly light-mode admin aesthetic: near-white canvas (#faf9fc), purple accent (#9333ea), white cards with soft shadow, left sidebar with entity switcher and grouped nav, top bar with search and period selector, 4 KPI tiles, dual-line area chart, upcoming-items side panel, and records table with category tag pills and progress bars.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-relay-helpdesk
plugins.title: Relay Admin
plugins.description: Friendly light-mode ops admin aesthetic: near-white slate canvas (#f8fafc), violet accent (#7c3aed / #8b5cf6), status-semantic palette (green / amber / red), Inter type, soft-shadow white cards at 10px radius, fine hairline borders. Archetype = left categorised sidebar + 56px topbar with search and filter dropdown + 4 KPI cards with sparklines + priority-tier bar strip + full-width records table with dual status pills + right load panel with presence indicators. Plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-saas-bestseller
plugins.title: SaaS Admin Bestseller
plugins.description: Polished light-mode admin aesthetic: near-white canvas (#f5f7fa), white card surfaces, indigo accent (#5369f8), soft card shadows, 12px radius, system font stack. Archetype = collapsible 256px grouped-nav sidebar + breadcrumb topbar + greeting strip + 4 stat tiles with sparklines + 8/4 mid-grid (area chart / activity feed) + full-width records table, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-savory-pos
plugins.title: Service Admin
plugins.description: Warm light-mode service back-office aesthetic: near-white canvas (#faf8f5), amber accent (#f59e0b) with tomato alert tones (#ef4444) on white cards, dark sidebar (#1c1917) with grouped nav sections, 4 KPI tiles with inline sparklines, 3-column live state board, ranked items list with inline bars, area-fill SVG trend chart, and dense records table with status pills. Archetype = 240px grouped-nav sidebar + 60px sticky topbar + KPI tile row + state board + bottom 2-column grid + records table.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-slate-commerce
plugins.title: Slate Admin
plugins.description: Clean light-mode admin aesthetic: warm white canvas (#ffffff / #f9fafb), emerald accent (#10b981) for positive states and primary actions, amber (#f59e0b) for caution, Inter type with tabular figures, 10px radii, subtle card shadows, and warm slate neutrals. Archetype = fixed sidebar (entity switcher + sectioned nav + user footer) + topbar (search + range selector + notification bell + avatar) + 4 KPI cards with inline sparklines + a metric bar chart + a ranked items panel + a full-width records table with status badges, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-sneat
plugins.title: Indigo SaaS Admin
plugins.description: Clean light-mode SaaS admin aesthetic: #f5f5f9 page canvas, white (#fff) card surfaces, indigo accent (#696cff), Public Sans type, 6px card radius, soft shadows, and muted body text (#646e78). Archetype = sticky top navbar (app title + search + notification + avatar) + left sidebar (nav groups with icons) + KPI stat tiles + mixed-width grid of charts and tables + paginated records table with status pills, plus list, form, settings, auth, error, email, and calendar screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-sprout-iot
plugins.title: Sprout Admin
plugins.description: Dark technical-fresh admin aesthetic: deep navy canvas (#0c1118), raised panels, lime (#84cc16) and cyan (#22d3ee) dual accents, amber/red severity ramp, Inter type with tabular figures, and dense hairline-bordered tables. Archetype = context-switcher topbar + left label rail + 4 KPI cards + 2-column grid (multi-channel sparkline panel + severity feed) + full-width records table, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for high-density live-data consoles that must read at a glance.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-statute-legal
plugins.title: Statute Admin
plugins.description: Refined warm-white professional admin aesthetic: warm-white canvas (#faf8f6), deep-burgundy accent (#9f1239 / #be123c), gold secondary accent (#b45309), Inter type with tabular figures, and white raised cards with a 3px accent top stripe. Archetype = dark sidebar with entity-switcher grouped nav + sticky topbar with search and period selector + 4 KPI tiles + 2-column grid (records table left, deadline feed + bar chart right) + full-width items list, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for authoritative yet approachable professional service consoles.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-sterling-bankops
plugins.title: Sterling Admin
plugins.description: Sober light-mode admin aesthetic: white card surfaces on a cool-grey page, slate-blue structural chrome with an emerald positive accent, grouped-nav sidebar with entity switcher, white topbar with period tabs, 4 KPI cards, action-queue panel with inline approve/reject, severity-feed side panel, records table with status pills, and an inline bar chart. Built for clarity and institutional trust.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-talent-ats
plugins.title: Light Indigo Admin
plugins.description: Light admin aesthetic: white sidebar on a near-white canvas, indigo accent (#4f46e5) + pink secondary (#ec4899), 1px slate borders, 12px-radius cards with a whisper shadow. Archetype = left sidebar (entity switcher + grouped nav) + topbar (search + period picker + avatar) + 4 KPI cards with sparklines + a kanban-style stage board + a conversion funnel chart + an upcoming-items side panel + a full-width records table, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-vault-treasury
plugins.title: Vault Admin
plugins.description: Deep-navy / amber-gold admin aesthetic: #0a0f1e canvas, raised navy panels (#121a2e / #1b2640), amber-gold accent (#f59e0b), cool-navy neutral ramp, Inter tabular figures, signed-amount rows (green / red), 8–10px radii. Archetype = labeled 220px rail nav with grouped sections + 60px topbar (entity switcher + period tabs + avatar) + 4 KPI cards with inline sparklines + 2-column (7fr area chart / 5fr allocation donut) + full-width records table with status pills, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for calm, high-clarity operational consoles that communicate magnitude at a glance.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-verdant-clinic
plugins.title: Verdant Admin
plugins.description: Calm light-mode admin aesthetic: near-white #f7faf9 canvas, white cards with emerald-to-teal accent (#10b981 / #0d9488), slate text hierarchy, and tri-tone status pills. Archetype = left sidebar (entity-switcher + sectioned nav + user chip) + 60px topbar + 4 KPI cards with sparklines + 2-column main grid (schedule board + chart panel) + full-width records table, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-volt-energy
plugins.title: Volt Admin
plugins.description: Deep-navy control-room admin aesthetic: near-black canvas (#0a0e14), raised panels, amber (#fbbf24) + cyan (#22d3ee) dual-accent on a steel-blue neutral ramp, Inter type with tabular figures, and dense hairline-bordered tables. Archetype = region-switcher navbar + icon rail + 4 KPI tiles + full-width status board (entity rows with state pills) + dual-series SVG trend chart + alerts panel + entity side panel, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for real-time operational consoles that must read at a glance.

plugins.name: wxcode-admin-voyage-travel
plugins.title: Voyage Admin
plugins.description: Airy light-mode admin aesthetic: white-and-pale-blue canvas (#f6fafc), sky-blue accent (#0ea5e9), coral secondary accent (#fb7185), grouped sidebar navigation with entity-switcher pill, 60px topbar with centered search and date-range chip, 4 KPI cards with sparklines and delta badges, a two-column content grid (entity board + breakdown chart), a dense records table, and a donut side panel. Archetype = sidebar nav + 4 KPI cards + two-column board/chart grid + records table + donut panel, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.
